Class AbstractSideProofRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.rule.AbstractSideProofRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ModalitySideProofRule, QuerySideProofRule
public abstract class AbstractSideProofRule extends Object implements BuiltInRule
Provides the basic functionality of BuiltInRule which computes something in a side proof.

    • AbstractSideProofRule

      public AbstractSideProofRule()

  • Method Details

    • createResultConstant

      protected Function createResultConstant(Services services, Sort sort)

      Creates a constant which is used in the original Proof to store the computed result in form of QueryResult = ...

      The used name is registered in the Namespace of the Services.

      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use-
      sort - The Sort to use.
      Returns:
      The created constant.

    • createResultFunction

      protected Function createResultFunction(Services services, Sort sort)
      Creates the result JFunction used in a predicate to compute the result in the side proof.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      sort - The Sort to use.
      Returns:
      The created result JFunction.

    • computeResultsAndConditions

      protected List<ResultsAndCondition> computeResultsAndConditions(Goal goal, ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment, Sequent sequentToProve, Function newPredicate) throws ProofInputException

      Starts the side proof and extracts the result JTerm and conditions.

      New used names are automatically added to the Namespace of the Services.

      Parameters:
      goal - The Goal on which this BuiltInRule should be applied on.
      sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
      sequentToProve - The Sequent to prove in a side proof.
      newPredicate - The JFunction which is used to compute the result.
      Returns:
      The found result JTerm and the conditions.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • replace

      protected static SequentFormula replace(PosInOccurrence pio, JTerm newTerm, Services services)
      Replaces the JTerm defined by the given PosInOccurrence with the given new JTerm.
      Parameters:
      pio - The PosInOccurrence which defines the JTerm to replace.
      newTerm - The new JTerm.
      Returns:
      The created SequentFormula in which the JTerm is replaced.

    • isApplicableOnSubTerms

      public boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms()
      Specified by:
      isApplicableOnSubTerms in interface BuiltInRule
